text_block_list.text:
A shooting star streaks past Yodo in autumn—a
new icon has been born, and the masses are
whipped into a frenzy.

Praise! Praise! Henceforth, this solo will become a
duo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haah ha ha ha! This is it! Ayabe's very first battle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The thunderous voice of T.M. Opera O—one of
Admire Vega's contemporaries and self-professed
"Overlord"—resonates through the spectator
stands.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Good friends, led by the star of destiny, we must
witness this inaugural performance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but listen to me, Doto! Today should be the
day that Ayabe stands center stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I'm trusting you! Warn me if the
spectacular brightness I unconsciously emit
begins to drown out that other star's light!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I understand! I'll warn you if you get too...
bright...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... It's already happening!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haah ha ha! What a predicament!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... But surely Ayabe will be able to look
radiant too, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I managed to come and watch. I was a
little worried when I took the wrong train the
seventh time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto is another peer. She's timid, yet
perseverant, and today her peculiar clumsiness
seems to be in full force.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I was able to make it this far thanks to the two of
you. Opera O and...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wha? Where did she go?
Wow! You've become a fan? My fan?

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! When I saw you in the Tracen Academy's
New Hope special, I was totally captivated!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan A
text_block_list.text: You looked so, so, sooo cool, Narita Top Road!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You run with such force! I'll always be cheering for
you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Thank you! I'm so happy to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But I'm only in the middle of training for my debut
race, so give me some time and...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my very best to live up to your
expectations!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your support, everyone! I hope
you'll continue to cheer me on.

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan A
text_block_list.text: Woooow! She makes me feel so... alive!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I love how direct she is! I think I would do
anything for her!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Doto and Opera O! Sorry about that! I was just
having a chat.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-wow, Top Road, you're as popular as ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road—the new star of the generation
that includes T.M. Opera O, Meisho Doto, and
Admire Vega.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She, too, is here to observe Admire Vega's debut.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh! They're entering the paddock soon. I wonder
if Ayabe is feeling ready.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Let's make sure she hears our support, right,
guys?

text_block_list.name: Opera O and Doto
text_block_list.text:
Indubitably!
Y-yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Admire Vega about the enthusiastic three
rooting for her in the stands.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I figured the news might ease her nerves, but
maybe I had no reason to be concerned. Admire
Vega is present and solemnly prepared.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, almost subconsciously, I look down at her
feet...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's fine.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'll let you know if I have any issues. You don't
have to keep asking each time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I won't be able to reciprocate either way.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm saying that I won't give you the response you
want.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't think I'm trying to be unpleasant either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I unconsciously chuckle. After all of that, at the
very least, I got an answer to my question—she's
doing fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not looking for her to be friendly with me. I
already decided to support her regardless.
choice_data_list: Keep your eyes forward while you're running.
Keep your eyes forward while you're running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not asking for her attention or consideration.
No matter how she relates to me...
choice_data_list: I'll follow you down whichever path you take.
I'll follow you down whichever path you take.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Official
text_block_list.text:
It's time! Will all the debuting racers make their
way to the paddock, please?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: All right.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The up-and-coming Umamusume making their
debuts today are finally in the paddock!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Which of our racers will steal the victory here at
Kyoto Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Yeah... I know. I'm shaking.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(The part of you left in me is shaking with joy and
anticipation.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going to win.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I promise, I'll win!
